query:
CREATE TABLE `appSettings` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `key` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `value` text,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `appSettings_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `appSettings_key_unique` UNIQUE(`key`)
);

CREATE TABLE `surveyResponses` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `sessionId` int,
  `satisfaction` int NOT NULL,
  `goodPoints` text,
  `visitTrigger` text,
  `visitTriggerOther` text,
  `freeComment` text,
  `googleReviewShown` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `googleReviewClicked` boolean DEFAULT false,
  `submittedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `surveyResponses_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE `intakeSessions` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `sessionToken` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `status` enum('intake','waiting','consulting','sf_pending','survey','completed') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'intake',
  `caseCategory` enum('with_opponent','no_opponent'),
  `caseType` varchar(128),
  `clientName` varchar(128),
  `clientNameKana` varchar(128),
  `clientBirthDate` date,
  `clientPostalCode` varchar(10),
  `clientAddress` text,
  `clientPhone` varchar(20),
  `clientMobile` varchar(20),
  `clientEmail` varchar(320),
  `clientOccupation` varchar(128),
  `clientReferrer` varchar(256),
  `consultationReason` text,
  `opponentName` varchar(128),
  `opponentNameKana` varchar(128),
  `opponentPostalCode` varchar(10),
  `opponentAddress` text,
  `opponentPhone` varchar(20),
  `opponentRelation` varchar(128),
  `sfClientSentAt` timestamp NULL,
  `sfOpponentSentAt` timestamp NULL,
  `sfClientLeadId` varchar(64),
  `sfOpponentLeadId` varchar(64),
  `surveyResponseId` int,
  `intakeCompletedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `consultationCompletedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `surveyCompletedAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()) ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  CONSTRAINT `intakeSessions_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `intakeSessions_sessionToken_unique` UNIQUE(`sessionToken`)
);

INSERT INTO `appSettings` (`key`, `value`) VALUES
  ('sf_org_id', ''),
  ('sf_web_to_lead_url', 'https://webto.salesforce.com/servlet/servlet.WebToLead?encoding=UTF-8'),
  ('google_review_url', ''),
  ('office_name', '朝日弁護士法人');
